purpose: Declare coverage governance status for every Ordivon checker.
coverage_policy: PASS is scoped. Coverage precedes confidence. Silent omission is not governance.

checkers.claimed_universe: All .md files under docs/ai, docs/governance, docs/product, docs/architecture, docs/runtime + identity surfaces
checkers.exclusion_policy: Exclusions carry reason, classification, owner, reviewed_at
checkers.notes: Completeness + identity surface checks in PV-N2H.

checkers.discovery_method: Load JSONL; no automated discovery of unregistered debt
checkers.exclusion_policy: None; debt discovery depends on other checkers
known_gaps: COV-2: Added conservative debt-candidate discovery scanning runtime/product/governance docs for BLOCKED, skipped verification, known gap, pending verification signals. Warning-only — does not block. False positives managed via exclusion file or human review.
Full auto-registration of discovered debt is deferred — requires human/agent judgment to distinguish actual debt from contextual mentions.
checkers.notes: COV-2: Now discovers ~174 debt-like signals. Still warning-only. Status: partial (discovery implemented, auto-classification deferred).

checkers.claimed_universe: Markdown receipt files under configured receipt_paths
checkers.registry_or_manifest: Receipt path config or hardcoded paths
checkers.exclusion_policy: None; all .md files in receipt directories scanned
known_gaps: Universe discovery covers 171 candidate files, 140 receipt-bearing. Default scan paths only cover 22 files — expanded universe is reported but not yet the default scan set.
checkers.notes: COV-2: Self-discovers receipt universe (171 candidates, 140 receipt-bearing). Reports files outside default scan paths. Status: implemented (universe is discovered and reported).

known_gaps: Does not discover gates that should exist but are not in manifest
checkers.notes: COV-2: Already validates manifest↔baseline gate consistency (12/12), no-op detection, gate_count match. Coverage governance gate is now validated.

known_gaps: Unrecorded external actions require separate discovery
checkers.notes: Evidence-only validation; does not authorize execution.

checkers.discovery_method: Load gate manifest, execute each gate
known_gaps: wave_files whitelist in ruff format gate remains hand-maintained (6 files). New test files must be explicitly added.
check_verification_manifest.py already validates manifest↔baseline gate consistency (12/12). Gate drift detection is implemented.
Wave file auto-discovery would require scanning the repo for all Python files in scope — deferred to future coverage-aware CI design.
checkers.notes: COV-2: Manifest↔baseline drift detection already implemented. wave_files whitelist is the remaining partial gap — explicitly documented.

checkers.claimed_universe: Candidate public wedge files defined by INCLUDE_PATHS
checkers.discovery_method: Filesystem collection from INCLUDE_PATHS; regex scan
known_gaps: INCLUDE_PATHS is hand-maintained; new files outside list are invisible

checkers.discovery_method: Load manifest, copy files matching include=true
known_gaps: Manifest is hand-maintained; reconciliation is manual
Does not discover new entrypoints or verify all paths
FORBIDDEN_PATHS is hand-maintained; currently BLOCKED: 244 private paths
checkers.notes: Blocked by pyproject.toml scope. Honest finding.
